description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle (Vehicle 1), traveling southwest on Howard Street in San Francisco, was stopped mid-way 
through a lane-change maneuver (from lane #2 to lane #1) in stop-and-go traffic, when a passenger car (Vehicle 2) in lane #1 accelerated 
toward the stopped Zoox vehicle and struck its left front wheel. The Zoox vehicle was towed from the scene for inspection and was found to 
have sustained no damage. Vehicle 2’s front bumper appears to have sustained minor damage. No injuries were reported. Police were 
notified but did not arrive at the scene. The Zoox vehicle’s video footage shows that Vehicle 2’s driver was not looking at the road ahead 
before or at the time of contact.
Print
Clear Form
